displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
** Actual product may come in different brand, packaging or/and country of origin depending on the stock availability
Freshness Guarantee for Online Orders:
• We pick the freshest item(s) and deliver to your doorstep
• Opt for a refund within 3 days of delivery if your items are not delivered fresh
• Check out our refund policy for fresh in the T&C for more details
The korea pear is a large round fruit that can be eaten raw or used as a sweetener in sauces or marinades. It is hard, crisp, sweet, juicy and because of the high water content, makes it an excellent snack to be enjoyed raw.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Keep chilled
• Avoid direct sunlight or heat.

• Corella pears have a mild flavour with a soft juicy flesh.
• They have a greenish-yellow skin with a red blush.
metaData.Preparation: Enjoy them as a quick and tasty snack, or use pair them with your favourite cheese or nuts.
metaData.Storage Information:
• To maintain its optimum quality for longer, store the item(s) whole in the fridge
• Best consumed within 21 days of delivery

The nam shui pear has an elongated base with a bulb-like top. It is crunchy and its smooth white flesh is juicy. It is commonly eaten raw due to its high water content and grainy texture, different from those grown elsewhere.

The China brown pear has a round apple-looking shape and turns a lovely brown-golden color when ripe. It is usually medium to large in size compared to other pears and is juicy, sweet and crisp. It is commonly eaten raw or as a great topping in salads or to add moisture to cakes, pies and breads.
metaData.Storage Information:
• To maintain its optimum quality for longer, store the item(s) whole in the fridge
• Best consumed within 14 days of delivery
